ac: AC1: retry-gate blocks at >=3 Review-History BOUNCE markers
evidence: Boundary: 0->allow, 1->allow, 2->allow, 3->BLOCK(exit2). Counts line-leading '- BOUNCE:' only in the ## Review History section.

ac: AC2: recurring choke point via re-assert (inert-gate fix)
evidence: witness.md fail-route re-asserts 'gh issue edit N --add-label dev/implement' each cycle; the gate fires on that re-assert (grep 're-asserting the implement label'). Without it the gate was inert (Chesterton).

ac: AC3: threshold = 2 retries / 3 attempts, block at >=3
evidence: BOUND=3; ilr-system.md pins '2 retries (3 build attempts)'. Fixes Chesterton off-by-one (was block-at-2 = only 1 retry).
retry-gate ALLOWS issue #5's own dev/implement flip though its tracking.md has 8 '- BOUNCE:' in prose (0 line-leading in Review History). Fixture with Design-Notes marker also allowed.

ac: AC5: ILR-only, robust match, honest override + BYPASS audit
evidence: no-tracking-dir->passthrough; unparseable N->fail-closed(2); CATALINA_RETRY_ALLOW=1->0+notice; ilr-system corrected to 'hooks print stderr only' + require '- BYPASS:' line.

ac: AC6: install.sh wires both gates idempotently
evidence: wiring loops witness-gate.js + retry-gate.js; tested idempotent + merge-preserving; retry-gate.js copied by hooks/*.js glob.

ac: AC7: witnessed fixtures + syntax + honest limitation
evidence: node --check + bash -n pass; fixtures 0/1/2/3 + false-positive guard + edges all correct. Documented: count is working-tree text (strong, not cryptographic); git-history derivation is future hardening.
AC2 recurring choke point via re-assert — the fix for Chesterton's load-bearing catch.
AC3 block at >=3 = 2 retries; ilr-system pins the definition.

premortem: first transition blocked by marker false-positive
evidence: AC4 section-scoped; proven on #5's own tracking.md (8 prose mentions -> allowed).
Documented honestly as strong-not-cryptographic; git-history derivation is a future hardening. Not resolved this cycle.
docs corrected (stderr only) + require committed '- BYPASS:' line in Review History for Deming.
